rationale: Both papers are methodological measurement pieces in marketing: the cited work introduces advanced SEM measurement analysis (trait/state and invariance), and the citing work develops a latent IRT measurement framework for ERS with multilevel structure. That makes a substantive methodological connection plausible, but the evidence here is only a single DOI-matched reference with no in-text citation context showing direct use of the cited panel-data approach. Given this limited evidence, it is not safe to drop or clearly keep.
